introSection: Relámpago is a steel roller coaster located at Mundo Petapa in Guatemala City, Guatemala. Relámpago is Spanish for Lightning.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The addition of Relámpago was announced by Zamperla during the 2018 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA. It opened on 20 December 2019.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Upon opening, this was the smallest Thunderbolt installation from Zamperla.

fullText:
Relámpago is a steel roller coaster located at Mundo Petapa in Guatemala City, Guatemala. Relámpago is Spanish for Lightning.

The addition of Relámpago was announced by Zamperla during the 2018 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA. It opened on 20 December 2019.

Upon opening, this was the smallest Thunderbolt installation from Zamperla.
